title: Silk Touch Spawners - Survival
description: A simple datapack that adds silk touch spawners that also drop their respective spawn egg to allow use in survival. Made for Minecraft 1.21
body:
# Silk touch spawners - Survival

For my server I required some simple spawners that could be picked up in survival, but the existing datapacks lacked any features that allowed for placing the spawners once picked up due to the loss of itemdata when placing objects in Survival.

This datapack circumvents that issue by dropping the spawn egg of the entity that was inside the spawner. 

It currently works by getting silk touch on your pickaxe and simply breaking the spawner. I might add a more rare custom enchant for it in the future.
